name: Mock Maple Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar and water in a saucepan, then bring to a boil.
2. In a frying pan, heat the white sugar until it melts and turns brown.
3. Add the brown sugar syrup from step 1 to the caramelized white sugar in the frying pan. Simmer until smooth and thick.
4. Pour the mixture into a pitcher containing the butter and vanilla extract.
